  "text": "The Node.js v22.13.0 ESM loader and CJS-ESM interop bridge spans the following key files:\n\n1. **ModuleLoader class** (`lib/internal/modules/esm/loader.js`): The central class (defined at line 110) orchestrating ESM module loading. It manages module maps, hooks, and coordinates resolution, loading, and evaluation.\n\n2. **CJS loader ESM fallback** (`lib/internal/modules/cjs/loader.js`): Contains `finalizeEsmResolution` (line 1258) which handles ESM package exports resolution from within the CommonJS loader, enabling CJS code to resolve ESM package exports.\n\n3. **ESM translators** (`lib/internal/modules/esm/translators.js`): Implements translators for different module formats (ESM JavaScript, CommonJS, JSON, Wasm, etc.), converting source into Module records.\n\n4. **ESM specifier resolver** (`lib/internal/modules/esm/resolve.js`): Contains `moduleResolve`, `defaultResolve`, `packageExportsResolve`, `packageImportsResolve`, `packageResolve`, and `finalizeResolution` — the complete ESM URL resolution algorithm.\n\n5. **ModuleJob linking/evaluation pipeline** (`lib/internal/modules/esm/module_job.js`): Defines `ModuleJobBase`, `ModuleJob` (async), and `ModuleJobSync` classes that handle the link and evaluate phases of the ES module lifecycle.\n\n6. **Entry point ESM detection** (`lib/internal/modules/run_main.js`): Contains `executeUserEntryPoint` which detects whether the entry point should be run as ESM or CJS. Also related: `lib/internal/main/run_main_module.js`.\n\n7. **Native ModuleWrap C++ binding** (`src/module_wrap.cc` and `src/module_wrap.h`): Implements the `ModuleWrap` C++ class that wraps V8's `v8::Module`, providing the native binding for ES module compilation, linking, and evaluation.\n\nAdditional supporting files include:\n- `lib/internal/modules/esm/hooks.js`: Loader hooks (resolve/load) infrastructure\n- `lib/internal/modules/esm/load.js`: The `defaultLoad` function\n- `lib/internal/modules/esm/module_map.js`: Module URL-to-job map\n- `lib/internal/modules/esm/get_format.js`: Format detection for URLs\n- `lib/internal/modules/esm/formats.js`: Format constants\n- `lib/internal/modules/esm/assert.js`: Import assertion validation\n- `lib/internal/modules/esm/create_dynamic_module.js`: Dynamic namespace modules\n- `lib/internal/modules/esm/fetch_module.js`: HTTPS module fetching\n- `lib/internal/modules/esm/initialize_import_meta.js`: `import.meta` population\n- `lib/internal/modules/esm/utils.js`: Shared utilities and condition sets\n- `lib/internal/modules/esm/shared_constants.js`: Shared ESM constants\n- `lib/internal/modules/esm/worker.js`: ESM worker thread support\n- `lib/internal/modules/package_json_reader.js`: Reads package.json for `type: 'module'` detection\n- `lib/internal/modules/helpers.js`: Module helper utilities"
